\tzpentry{ID3883}{Reverse Harmonics Publication Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3883 introduces Reverse Harmonics Publication Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \chi^2 = \sum_{\omega} \left|\frac{S_{\text{obs}}(\omega) - S_{\text{pred}}(\omega; \{n,l,m,m_{KK}\})}{{\sigma_{\text{noise}}(\omega)}}\right|^2 \end{equation}
